title: The weight penalty that ruins F1 performance
summary: Discover how much weight really affects performance in motorsport! We break down how minimum weight rules work in Formula 1, how teams use ballast, and which teams are under or over the weight limit heading into the 2026 Miami Grand Prix. With a direct comparison between laps with no added weight and +20kg ballast, you’ll clearly see where time is lost.
